brief: Escalating Iran-US tensions over oil routes and China's economic slowdown dominate global news, while research papers explore AI in communication, data visualization, and emotional analysis.
news_summary: Iran threatens to block Strait of Hormuz amid US blockade; China's GDP growth hits 4.3%, lowest since 2022; Thames Water's debt rises to £18.5bn; Ukraine targets Russian ships near Crimea; Spain and Gibraltar celebrate border deal.
papers_summary: Papers address multimodal emotion descriptors for digital objects (CD-MED), graph database visualization (GraphPolaris), AI research assistants for interdisciplinary science (Aïra), and real-time generation of listener nodding in avatars.

en.brief: Escalating Iran-US tensions over oil routes and China's economic slowdown dominate global news, while research papers explore AI in communication, data visualization, and emotional analysis.
en.news_summary: Iran threatens to block Strait of Hormuz amid US blockade; China's GDP growth hits 4.3%, lowest since 2022; Thames Water's debt rises to £18.5bn; Ukraine targets Russian ships near Crimea; Spain and Gibraltar celebrate border deal.
en.papers_summary: Papers address multimodal emotion descriptors for digital objects (CD-MED), graph database visualization (GraphPolaris), AI research assistants for interdisciplinary science (Aïra), and real-time generation of listener nodding in avatars.

zh.brief: 今日新聞涵蓋中國經濟放緩、霸王龍化石拍賣創紀錄、胎盤走私、異見人士偷渡等話題；科研論文方面無中文優先項目，英文論文多聚焦人機互動與AI溝通。
zh.news_summary: 中國第二季度GDP增長放緩至4.3%，為2022年底以來最低；巴基斯坦掀起胎盤走私調查，揭露全球市場；霸王龍化石以5010萬美元拍出，創恐龍標本紀錄；異見人士董廣平駕艇穿越黃海偷渡。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無中文科研論文，英文論文多涉及人工智能與人機互動，如跨模態情感描述、圖數據庫可視化、文化敏感性錯誤信息檢測等。

todays_image.caption: The dismissal of Rastafarians' cannabis bid parallels the overlooked potential of Lobophora sp., both natural entities entangled in societal debate despite their inherent value.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
